summary: Kick started repo-native session and captured initial memory context.
Added a regression test for the open-session guard in the memory CLI and verified the full test suite.
Opened a follow-up session to test and fix helper compatibility with repo-native memory files.
Validated and hardened repo-native memory helpers against manual YAML frontmatter and duplicate session closes.
Opened a session to review recent repo changes and identify Figma and shadcn component boundaries.
Reviewed the release-prep commit, identified the current local memory-protocol changes, and mapped the main inspector UI into concrete Figma and shadcn component candidates.
Opened a session to replace branch-save persistence with direct source writes during manipulation.
Replaced branch-save persistence with direct source writes during manipulation, updated the inspector messaging, and verified the new flow with type-check and tests.
Opened a session to rename the demo action button copy after the live-sync rewrite.
Renamed the demo action button to 'Update Design' and kept the core widget on direct live source syncing.
Opened a session to restore explicit Update Design applies and add the missing text color control.
Restored explicit Update Design applies, kept draft previews local until save time, and added the missing text color control with passing verification.
Opened a session to hide the Appearance fill control for text selections.
Hid the Appearance fill control for plain text selections and verified the new context-aware behavior with tests.
Opened a session to implement the Figma linked property input group in the existing per-side control.
Matched the per-side control layout to the Figma linked property input group and verified the inspector styling change with type-check and tests.
Opened a session to apply the Figma input-container design to the shared inspector input fields.
Applied the Figma input-container design to the shared inspector inputs and verified the new shell-based number fields with type-check and tests.
Opened a follow-up session to widen the inspector properties panel from 320px to 360px.
Increased the inspector properties panel width from 320px to 360px and recorded the follow-up UI tweak in repo-native memory.
Opened a read-only session to inspect CraftKit Figma node 123:2407 and map it to the current inspector UI.
Inspected CraftKit node 123:2407 and recorded that it is the full Hawk-Eye inspector composition for future parity work.
Opened a session to restyle the floating inspector trigger to match CraftKit node 126:2828.
Matched the floating inspector trigger to CraftKit node 126:2828 and verified the updated trigger styling with a workspace type-check.
Opened a session to add a dedicated client asset folder for logos and icons.
Created a dedicated client asset folder for logos and icons under packages/client/src/assets/brand/.
Opened a session to wire packages/client/src/assets/brand/Logo.svg into the floating inspector trigger.
Wired the provided Logo.svg into the floating trigger, added SVG module typing for the client package, and verified the change with a workspace type-check.
Opened a session to swap the floating trigger logo asset to Logo-White.svg.
Swapped the floating trigger logo asset to Logo-White.svg and verified the import path with a workspace type-check.
Opened a session to match the floating trigger logo height to the trigger font size.
Matched the floating trigger logo size to the 17px trigger font size.
Opened a session to increase the floating trigger logo render size to 24px.
Increased the floating trigger logo render size to 24px.
Opened a session to update the open-panel title to use the same white logo asset as the floating trigger.
Updated the open-panel title to use the shared white logo asset and verified the change with a workspace type-check.
Opened a session to temporarily remove the Layers tab from the inspector shell for alpha.
Temporarily removed the Layers tab from the inspector shell for alpha while leaving the separate LayersPanel implementation available for later restoration.
Opened a session to remove the leftover single Properties tab shell from the inspector.
Removed the leftover single Properties tab shell from the open inspector and verified the cleanup with a workspace type-check.
Opened a session to implement dynamic className alpha support via inline-style fallback and improve save failure messaging.
Implemented dynamic className alpha support via inline-style fallback metadata and inspector messaging, and replaced generic no-op save errors with warning-derived messages.
Opened a session to implement style-expression wrapping for dynamic className saves and remove the remaining blocked dynamic style path.

Implemented style-expression wrapping for non-detached dynamic className saves, updated the inspector hinting to keep Update Design enabled, and verified the change with focused tests plus a clean type-check.
Opened a session to update the size-group aspect-ratio lock icon to match the provided Figma node.
Updated the size-group aspect-ratio lock control to use the Figma lock/unlock glyphs from node 131:2865 and verified the change with a clean type-check plus test run.
Opened a session to fix stale source-token handling after source refresh so repeated saves do not target dead JSX coordinates.
Fixed stale source-token rebinding after source refresh so repeated saves use the updated JSX coordinates, and covered it with a DesignTool regression test.
Opened a session to fix save-capability authorization failures across HMR/client reconnects.
Fixed save-capability authorization failures across HMR reconnects by keeping issued capability tokens valid after websocket client identity changes.
Opened a session to fix opacity UI semantics so the control uses 1-100% instead of displaying raw 0-1 values with a percent suffix.
Fixed the opacity control to present percentage semantics in the UI while continuing to preview and persist normalized CSS opacity values.
Opened a session to explain the project's engineering and design decisions from memory, docs, and source.
Reconstructed the project's current engineering and design decisions from repo memory, docs, sessions, and implementation for an explanatory walkthrough.
Opened a session to drive the repo to a clean same-day pre-alpha state by auditing the current changeset, parallelizing polish and hardening work, and landing the highest-value readiness fixes.

Polished the demo entry surface into an honest pre-alpha workbench with a real inspector launcher, stronger typography, restrained motion, and no fake publish or review affordances, then verified it with a successful demo build.
Opened a session to fix the broken Hawk-Eye logo in the packaged runtime by tracing the asset path through the public bundle.
Fixed the broken packaged logo by inlining the Hawk-Eye mark in the inspector runtime, added a regression test, and verified the build no longer references the old external logo asset.
Opened a session to implement the inspector motion polish pass with animated shell presence, refined interaction feedback, and deterministic test coverage.
Implemented the inspector motion polish pass with pointer-only shell handoff, directional panel-state transitions, reduced-motion handling, and deterministic regression coverage.
Opened a session to install the selected hardening skills and strengthen the Hawk-Eye Vite plugin and public package without changing the public API.

Installed the selected hardening skills, tightened the plugin runtime around transform failures, cache scope, and stale save capabilities, added public-package validation and CI release checks, and verified the result with full local gates plus a real-browser demo pass.
Opened a session to align the inspector shell, shared controls, and changes view to CraftKit node 145:8013 while preserving compatible product-specific copy.

Aligned the inspector shell, footer variants, changes cards, section framing, and linked per-side controls to CraftKit node 145:8013 and verified the result with the repo test suite and workspace type-check.
Opened a session to investigate inspector scrolling issues and fix fill and border property failures against CraftKit node 145:8013.

Fixed the inspector scroll stack, made fill edits flatten layered backgrounds in preview and persisted source, and made border edits self-start on borderless elements, with targeted tests and type-check passing.
Opened a session to remove the visible source/path label row from the inspector shell.
Removed the visible source/path label from the inspector shell, kept the detach action available, and verified the change with targeted tests and type-check.
Opened a session to fix the stale demo import path so inspector shell changes reach the running app.
Switched local demo serve aliases to package source entrypoints, rebuilt the hawk-eye bundle, and removed the stale dist delivery path that kept the old inspector shell visible.
Opened a session to add a public Hawk-Eye installer CLI that patches React + Vite apps for zero-step mounting.
Added a public hawk-eye init installer CLI with AST-based React + Vite patching, documented the zero-step workflow, and verified it with installer tests, type-check, build, and CLI help output.
Opened a session to debug why Apply is failing instead of writing edits back to source.

Reproduced the Apply failure to a misordered Vite plugin stack, reordered hawkeyePlugin ahead of react in the demo and installer flow, added a startup warning for manual configs, and verified the fix with tests, type-check, and a corrected live source token.
Opened a session to restore the Layers tab in the inspector shell before motion work.

Restored the Layers tab in the inspector shell, kept Pending Changes as the separate review flow, added regression coverage for the restored behavior, and verified the changed client surface with targeted tests and client package type-check.
Opened a session to find a security audit skill and perform a repository security audit.
Completed a security audit, recorded two code-level risks in the dev write path, and logged dependency advisories from pnpm audit.
Opened a session to implement the inspector visual redesign across the client shell, controls, layers panel, and demo validation surface.
Implemented the inspector visual redesign with a new token palette, stronger shell hierarchy, richer layers metadata, and passing targeted verification.
Opened a session for Hawk-Eye Figma design-library Phase 0 discovery.
Opened session for Figma-vs-properties-panel UI review.
Opened release-readiness session and recorded initial scope.
Aligned public release docs to the actual package surface and removed bundled import.meta warnings so the workspace build is green again.
Opened implementation session for Figma-matched editor panel and property applicability fixes.
Implemented the Figma-matched editor inspector pass, fixed border and sizing applicability behavior, and verified with the focused design-tool suite plus workspace build.
Opened session for Figma node 268:1800 control-alignment fixes.
Aligned per-side controls and size display formatting to the Figma inspector node and verified with the focused design-tool suite plus workspace build.
Opened session for Figma node 142:6151 section padding and divider spacing fixes.
Matched the inspector section padding rhythm to Figma node 142:6151 and verified the focused design-tool suite.
Opened session for v1 property-surface implementation across the panel, fill controls, and source writer.
Implemented the approved v1 property surface, added multi-format fill editing, preserved solid fill persistence semantics, and verified the focused editor and writer suites.
Opened session for inspector footer Figma parity work.
Matched the properties footer to the approved Figma rail styling and verified the focused design-tool suite.
Opened follow-up session to remove the v1 visible/hide footer control.
Removed the v1 visible/hide footer control, cleaned up the prop chain, and verified the focused inspector suite.
Opened corrective session to restore the footer preview toggle and remove the appearance visibility control instead.
Restored the footer preview toggle, removed the appearance-section display control, and verified the focused inspector suite.
Opened session for padding opposite-sides grouped editing.
Replaced padding's all-sides grouped mode with opposite-sides grouping, fixed numeric arrow-key stepping to use the visible value first, and verified the focused inspector suite.
Opened a session to gate the Appearance fill colour control by effective fill type.
Closed the session after hiding the Appearance fill colour control for explicit gradient and image fills and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to relax Appearance fill visibility so only paragraphs stay excluded.
Closed the session after relaxing Appearance fill visibility to exclude only paragraphs and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to remove overlay tint and keep only borders for selection highlighting.
Closed the session after switching the selection overlay to border-only highlighting and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to sanitize dash/gap inputs so invalid characters like commas do not remain visible.
Closed the session after sanitizing the split dash/gap controls and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to fix comma-separated dasharray parsing after arrow-key updates.
Closed the session after fixing comma-separated dasharray parsing and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to hide dash-array controls for non-SVG borders.
Closed the session after restoring the SVG-only dash-array gate and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to restore dash-array controls for dashed borders.
Closed the session after restoring dash-array controls for dashed borders and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to remove dashed borders and dash-array controls from the focused inspector.
Closed the session after removing dashed borders and dash-array controls from the focused inspector and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to fix width and height editing so authored size values survive draft creation.
Closed the session after preserving authored width and height values during draft creation and verifying the focused size suites.
Opened a session to fix width fill handling by preserving width and height keyword baselines.
Opened a session to match the changes panel to the Figma design at node 268:1925.
Matched the changes panel more closely to the Figma design by updating the header, card styling, overlay treatment, and removing the dedicated changes footer, with focused design-tool tests passing.
Opened a session to audit whether the current UI uses icons from the assets folder.
Closed the session after confirming the current UI uses inline React SVG icons rather than SVGs from the assets folder.
Opened a session to switch properties-panel icons over to the checked-in SVG asset files.
Closed the session after wiring properties-panel segmented controls to SVG icon assets and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to debug the stuck pending style-analysis banner blocking Update Design.
Closed the session after restoring the Vite hot-client bridge so style-analysis events can resolve and unblock Update Design.
Opened a session to normalize initialized OKLCH stroke colors to hex in the properties panel.
Closed the session after adding direct OKLCH parsing so initialized color fields render in hex consistently.
Opened a session to make grouped per-side toggles apply their visible value immediately.
Closed the session after making grouped per-side toggles propagate the visible value immediately and verifying the focused suites.
Opened a session to normalize grouped stroke-width edits to the currently visible border color.
Closed the session after making grouped stroke-width edits preserve the currently visible border color and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to bring corner linking into parity with the fixed grouped side controls.
Closed the session after making corner linking commit immediately and rerunning the targeted regression plus the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to hide fill for plain text elements while keeping it for text with a visible background.
Closed the session after tightening the text-fill visibility rule and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Closed the session after preserving width and height keyword baselines for fill and hug sizing and rerunning the focused size suites.
Opened a follow-up session to sync live size-mode metadata during width and height editing.
Closed the follow-up session after syncing live size-mode metadata during editing and rerunning the focused size suites.
Opened a session to fix fill visibility for transparent background shorthand on plain text elements.
Closed the session after treating transparent background shorthand as no visible background and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to hide width and height controls from the v1 inspector UI while keeping the size logic for later versions.
Closed the session after hiding width and height from the v1 inspector UI, centering the empty state, and rerunning the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to restore the Figma-matched changes-view footer with icon+label buttons and tooltips.
Restored the changes-view footer with Figma-matched icon+label buttons, tooltips, and passing design-tool coverage.
Opened a follow-up session to correct the footer icon variants to match the Figma node.
Corrected the footer icon variants to the Figma-matched active/inactive assets and verified the design-tool suite.
Opened a follow-up session to restore the labeled changes-panel footer variant at Figma node 142:6480.
Restored the labeled Apply/Hide/Reset changes-panel footer variant at Figma node 142:6480 and verified the design-tool suite.
Opened a session to replace the generic changes-footer helper with a reusable Figma-matched footer action button pattern.
Added a reusable FooterActionButton pattern for the changes footer, matched the Figma-labeled button chrome, and verified the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to apply the footer action pattern across all inspector panels.
Applied the shared footer action pattern across properties and changes panels and verified the focused design-tool suite.
Opened a session to implement semantic class dropdown editing with detach-only behavior.
Opened a session to move grid child span controls to v2 alongside width and height manipulation.
Moved grid child span controls out of the v1 inspector, updated the regression to match, and verified the focused design-tool suite.
Implemented semantic authored class target editing with dropdown selection, live preview, detach-only behavior, stylesheet writes, and regression coverage.
Opened a session to fix the footer buttons to match the Figma design.
Opened a session to inspect and implement a Figma design, pending the node reference.
Fix class-target preview propagation: drive global class-target `<style>` from all dirty class-target drafts and add regression coverage for selection switching.
Swap “Show” footer toggle icon to a different SVG asset (alternate Hide icon variant) per Figma footer spec.
Updated footer preview toggle so the Show label uses the alternate icon variant (instead of always reusing the Hide icon).
Remove active styling from the changes footer hide/show edits preview toggle (stop emitting data-active for footer-hide-btn).
Removed data-active emission for footer-hide-btn in the changes footer to prevent blue active styling.
Implement Figma changes-footer node 142:6482 with back button navigation, label-only Apply Edits, and compact icon-only Hide/Reset actions.
Matched the changes footer to Figma node 142:6482, including the footer back button navigation and compact icon-button layout.
Decouple the demo chip styles so .he-chip and .he-status-chip each own their styling.
Decoupled the demo chip and status-chip styles by moving shared pill layout declarations into each class and removing the inline status-chip color override.
Invalidate cached authored class targets and style analysis when watched stylesheet files change outside Hawk-Eye saves.
Added watcher-driven style cache invalidation so external stylesheet edits refresh authored class targets and style-analysis results without a dev-server restart.
Fix class-target switching so pending edits do not rebind from the first selected class to the second selected class.
Rebased class-target switching to rebuild the draft on dropdown changes, preventing pending edits from jumping onto the newly selected selector and its peers.
Implement class-scoped inspector properties so the panel only shows controls authored by the selected class target while detached mode keeps the full element property view.

Updated class-target initialization so all property groups remain visible while only the selected class target's authored values are prefilled, and detached mode still restores the combined element view.
Fix the two client-ui-controls regressions by aligning the flexDirection expectation and making the color picker commit bare hex input on Enter.
Fixed the focused client-ui-controls regressions by matching the current flexDirection schema in tests and allowing the color picker to commit bare hex input on Enter.
Fix class property initialization in the panel by rebasing drafts from live authored class analysis while preserving user edits.
Rebased selection and style-analysis draft refreshes so class-backed panel values initialize from fresh authored metadata while preserving active dirty overrides.
Fix the remaining class-panel initialization bug where reselection before fresh analysis clears class target context.
Preserved resolved class-target context across pre-analysis reselection rebases so the panel keeps correct class-backed initialization while fresh analysis is pending.
Inspect the property panel rendering path for class-target-selected drafts and determine whether background color and corner radius are being hidden, misread, or left uninitialized.

Confirmed the properties panel is consuming hydrated draft snapshots rather than owning class-target initialization; any missing background color or corner radius is upstream draft hydration/rebase, not panel snapshot selection.
Started investigation into class-target property-panel initialization for background color and corner radius.
Resolved class-target initialization for pending-analysis target switches and expanded authored border-radius shorthand into the panel-facing corner snapshots.
Investigate and fix the missing background-color/button appearance breakage in class-target mode.
Fixed button background hydration in class-target mode by narrowing the live visual fallback to buttons and added focused regressions for multi-class button selection.
Investigate and fix reversed button class-target property ownership in the properties panel.
Fixed reversed button property ownership by preferring the background-authoring button class target on first selection while keeping values scoped to the active target.
